column1: # Core glossary: word <TAB> kazakh <TAB> simple english <TAB> pos (optional)
# Ordered by how often the word appears in the six books, so the top of this
# file is what a reader meets on almost every page. Inflected forms are only
# listed when the guesser in dict.js cannot get back to the base (went, took,
# children) or when the form means something of its own (I'm, don't).
# Anything not here is fetched online once and cached. To see what is worth
